content.en:
The status of the secret master of the heavy palace is extremely high, and he is good at refining spiritual liquids such as heavy palace Xuan liquid, pill liquid, etc., and his net worth is extremely high, even if his qualifications are poor, it is not difficult to improve his cultivation.

For example, the half-hung heavy palace secret master of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce before, his cultivation has reached the seventh heaven realm, and his strength is extremely strong, no less than Xiao Ya.

So.

Xiao Ya felt that there was something wrong with this Fourth Heavenly Heavy Palace Secret Master who came to the door, and his cultivation was too low.

Could it be that he has just become a heavy palace secret master?

"Let's see it, in case you have some talent, you can refine the heavy palace Xuan liquid!"

Immediately, Xiao Ya let the heavy palace secret master in.

......

Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

Ye Tian came here, his purpose was to become the Chonggong Secret Master of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, according to his understanding, the Chonggong Secret Master was undoubtedly the most profitable industry, more profitable than refining weapons, and his status was very high.

He wants to obtain a lot of resources to improve his strength, and becoming a Heavy Palace Secret Master is undoubtedly the best choice.

He had previously purchased a Chonggong Xuanye and the incomplete Chonggong Mystic Inheritance,31 and researched this profession and found that the Chonggong Mystic was similar to an alchemist, but it was not an alchemist, but used the Chonggong in his body to refine the Chonggong Xuanli, Dan Liquid, and so on.

And the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid is very important to cultivators, so the status of the Heavy Palace Secret Master is extremely high.

Ye Tian himself also deduced and perfected the Heavy Palace Secret Master's technique, and now he can refine the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid, but it is only an ordinary Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid.

It just so happened that he learned about the plight of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, so he took the initiative to come, with the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce as a backer, he had no problem collecting resources, and he could also use the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce to collect many items and inheritance information, etc.

Soon.

Ye Tian met Xiao Ya, the president of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

Xiao Ya frowned slightly when she saw Ye Tian, obviously a little disappointed, in her opinion, Ye Tian was not only low in cultivation, but also too young, and did not have the unique temperament of a normal heavy palace secret master.

Is this really the secret master of the heavy palace?

"Your Excellency is really the Heavy Palace Secret Master?" Xiao Ya asked.

"President Xiao, I am indeed a Heavy Palace Secret Master, if I don't believe it, I can refine the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid on the spot!"

Ye Tian said.

Xiao Ya directly asked Ye Tian to refine the heavy palace Xuan liquid, and Xiao Ya and a group of high-level officials of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce watched one after another.

I saw that Ye Tian took out some materials for refining the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid, and began to put them into the Heavy Palace in his body, refining the most ordinary Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid, which was also the only Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid he knew at the moment - the hundred-yuan Mystery Liquid.

Chonggong Xuanli is a general name, and it is actually divided into many kinds.

Low-level Xuanli, Intermediate Xuanli, High-level Xuanli, and top-level Xuanli, among which the low-level Xuanliquid is of great help to cultivators below the Fifth Heaven.

The low-grade Xuan liquid is also divided into 60% purity, 7% purity, 80% purity, and 90% purity according to the purity.

Low-grade Xuan liquid with a purity of less than sixty percent is not qualified and is not allowed to be sold.

Time passed slowly, and after a period of time, Ye Tian had already refined a batch of hundred-yuan Xuan liquid, and then moved out of the heavy palace in his body.

When everyone saw the hundred-yuan Xuan Liquid that Ye Tian had just refined, they identified it as the Xuan Liquid that had just been refined, and it was not a fraud.

"President, this is a hundred-yuan Xuanli of ninety percent purity!"

A senior executive of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce said excitedly.

"What, ninety out of three purity hundred-yuan Xuanli!!!!"

Xiao Ya was shocked.

Although she is not a heavy palace secret master, she also knows what the purity of ninety percent three represents, and the half-hung heavy palace secret master of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce before can only refine seventy percent of the hundred-yuan Xuan liquid, while Ye Tian directly refined the ninety-three hundred-yuan Xuanli.

Compared to Ye Tian, that Heavy Palace Secret Master is simply a spicy chicken!

In fact, Ye Tian still hid his level.

If he wanted to, he could even refine a hundred-yuan Xuan Liquid of ten percent purity, but that would be too high-profile, after all, there was no Chonggong Secret Master in the entire Zilan Mountain who could refine such a quality of Chonggong Xuanli.

Therefore, he deliberately hid his level and only refined a ninety percent three-quality hundred-yuan Xuan liquid, which was almost comparable to the top batch of heavy palace secret masters in Zilan Mountain, which would make the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce pay attention to it, but it would not treat him as a monster.

"This gentleman, your level is too high, we Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce welcome you to join!"

Xiao Ya said very excitedly.

"I can join the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, but I need absolute freedom, and if you are okay, you can't disturb me......"

Ye Tian put forward a lot of conditions in a row, and Xiao Ya agreed.

After all, as long as Ye Tian joins the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, then the dilemma of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce can be solved.

Subsequently.

The days that followed.

Ye Tian refined the heavy palace liquid for the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, and he also obtained many refining methods for the heavy palace liquid, including many of the intermediate methods for refining the heavy palace liquid.

As for the material problem, there is no need for Ye Tian to worry about it, the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce will send materials to Ye Tian.

At Ye Tian's level, refining a heavy palace liquid like a hundred yuan Xuanye is undoubtedly very easy, and the quality is controlled at ninety percent three purity, and occasionally refining ninety percent four degrees, and the heavy palace Xuanliquid he prepared for himself is naturally ten percent pure.

With enough Chonggong Xuanli, Ye Tian often began to refine Chonggong Xuanliquid to improve his strength.

The only pity is that his replication talent has not yet recovered from 497, and only after his strength is stronger can he completely restore his replication talent, and then he can condense the replication body and refine the Chonggong Xuan Liquid while cultivating.

The other side.

The Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce took out a large amount of low-grade heavy palace liquid such as 100 yuan Xuan Liquid and began to sell it to the outside world, with a quality of up to ninety percent and three purity, which immediately attracted a large number of cultivators.

Suddenly, the reputation of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce became famous, and the business skyrocketed, and other businesses were lived.

The Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, which was originally in trouble and precarious, turned from danger to safety, and even had a tendency to rise again.

Seeing this scene, several other chambers of commerce were anxious and immediately called a meeting.

Zilan Mountain.

Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

Representatives of the Maple Leaf Chamber of Commerce and the Tushan Chamber of Commerce came to the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce to discuss the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

At this time, the president of the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce, Hei Shan, spoke: "Before the three thousand heavy palace years, three intermediate heavy palace secret masters of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce were killed, and a ten-fold heaven cultivator fell, resulting in the decline of the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.
